description: HPLC modeled as Lock
MASS_SPEC modeled as Lock
CELL_LAB modeled as Lock
FORMULATION_SUITE modeled as Lock
biological_samples modeled as Counter (initial=3)
channel from CHEMIST to FORMULATION_SCIENTIST for compound
channel from FORMULATION_SCIENTIST to BIOLOGIST for formulated compound
channel from FORMULATION_SCIENTIST to TOXICOLOGIST for formulated compound
channel from BIOLOGIST to CLINICAL_LEAD for bioactivity report
channel from TOXICOLOGIST to CLINICAL_LEAD for toxicity report
channel from CLINICAL_LEAD to REGULATORY_SPECIALIST for clinical review
channel from REGULATORY_SPECIALIST to PROJECT_DIRECTOR for compliance decision
channel from REGULATORY_SPECIALIST to CLINICAL_LEAD for clinical hold/clearance
channel from PROJECT_DIRECTOR to CHEMIST for final decision or retry
channel from PROJECT_DIRECTOR to FORMULATION_SCIENTIST for retry signal
formulation preparation can pass or fail
BIOLOGIST's bioassay can pass or fail (consumes sample)
BIOLOGIST's HPLC stability check can pass or fail
TOXICOLOGIST's cytotoxicity assay can pass or fail (consumes sample)
REGULATORY_SPECIALIST can approve or issue clinical hold
PROJECT_DIRECTOR decides continue, retry, or abort
FORMULATION_SCIENTIST works only after receiving compound from CHEMIST
BIOLOGIST and TOXICOLOGIST evaluate only after receiving formulated compound
CLINICAL_LEAD reviews only after receiving BOTH bio and tox reports
REGULATORY_SPECIALIST reviews only after receiving clinical review
PROJECT_DIRECTOR decides only after receiving regulatory decision
CHEMIST documentation only after receiving PROJECT_DIRECTOR's decision
run_hplc_analysis requires holding HPLC
run_mass_spec_analysis requires holding MASS_SPEC
run_cell_assay requires holding CELL_LAB
prepare_formulation requires holding FORMULATION_SUITE
regulatory hold acquires HPLC + MASS_SPEC simultaneously
4-instrument contention with 7 agents competing
biological_samples=3 bounds total assay attempts — counter exhaustion blocks protocol
circular: PROJECT_DIRECTOR->CHEMIST->FORMULATION_SCIENTIST->bio/tox->CLINICAL_LEAD->REGULATORY_SPECIALIST->PROJECT_DIRECTOR
regulatory hold acquires HPLC+MASS_SPEC, blocking all scientists using these instruments
tox failure -> new formulation -> new synthesis; each cycle costs a biological sample
BIOLOGIST and TOXICOLOGIST evaluate in parallel (fan-in at CLINICAL_LEAD)
multiple scientists perform preparation work concurrently
